base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_tile_atlas — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Master in-stage tile atlas — all 9 biomes' blocks/pipes/platforms/hazards. 2003×1600 large. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Master in-stage tile atlas — all 9 biomes' blocks/pipes/platforms/hazards. 2003×1600 large
